description: World Cup prediction vault for Flap users: shows BNB tax revenue, betting reward stats, WorldCupViewer results, and clean market metadata. Admin/emergency controls are intentionally hidden from the user UI.

methods.name: description
methods.description: Live status banner with revenue held and latest World Cup settlement state.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: Human-readable vault status

methods.name: totalRevenueReceived
methods.description: Total BNB tax revenue received by this Flap vault.

outputs.name: amountWei
outputs.description: Total BNB revenue received

methods.name: taxToken
methods.description: Flap token connected to this vault.

outputs.name: taxToken
outputs.description: Connected Flap tax token

methods.name: bettingVault
methods.description: Betting vault where users place predictions and claim tax-reward distributions.

outputs.name: bettingVault
outputs.description: Connected betting vault

methods.name: bettingMarketCount
methods.description: Number of betting markets available in the connected betting vault.

outputs.name: count
outputs.description: Betting market count

methods.name: totalBettingRewardShares
methods.description: Total net bettor stake currently earning pro-rata tax rewards.

outputs.name: shares
outputs.description: Total reward shares

methods.name: totalTaxRewardsReceivedByBetting
methods.description: Total BNB tax rewards forwarded to the betting reward pool.

outputs.name: amountWei
outputs.description: Tax rewards received by betting vault

methods.name: claimableBettingTaxRewards
methods.description: Check how much BNB tax reward a wallet can claim in the betting vault.

outputs.name: amountWei
outputs.description: Claimable BNB tax rewards

methods.name: lastSettlementResolved
methods.description: Whether the latest stored WorldCupViewer settlement refresh is resolved.

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Latest settlement resolved

methods.name: lastSettlementTeamName
methods.description: Team name from the latest stored settlement refresh.

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Latest resolved team name

methods.name: getWorldCupWinner
methods.description: Read the current 2026 FIFA World Cup champion result from WorldCupViewer.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getGroupWinner
methods.description: Read a Group A-L winner from WorldCupViewer. Group A starts at matchId 2; Group L is 13.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getMatchResult
methods.description: Read any WorldCupViewer match result by matchId.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match ID

outputs.name: matchName
outputs.description: Human-readable match name

outputs.name: isResolved
outputs.description: Whether the oracle/viewer has settled this result

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: Winning team ID; 0 pending, 49 others, 50 draw

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Winning team name, tie message, others, or empty while pending

methods.name: getTeamName
methods.description: Resolve a WorldCupViewer team ID into a team name. Reserved: 49 = others, 50 = draw.

outputs.name: teamName
outputs.description: Team name or reserved label

methods.name: marketCount
methods.description: Number of Polymarket/World Cup metadata mappings stored in this Flap vault.

outputs.name: count
outputs.description: Metadata market count

methods.name: getMarket
methods.description: Read one clean World Cup market mapping: label, Polymarket slug, team, timing, and active flag.

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match/group/champion ID

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer team ID tied to this market

outputs.name: polymarketConditionId
outputs.description: Polymarket condition ID metadata

outputs.name: marketSlug
outputs.description: Polymarket market slug or URL path

outputs.name: label
outputs.description: Human-readable market label/thesis

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: active
outputs.description: Whether this mapping is currently active

methods.name: getMarkets
methods.description: Read a paginated table of World Cup market mappings. Limit is capped at 100.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: Maximum items to return; capped at 100

outputs.name: matchId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer match/group/champion ID

outputs.name: teamId
outputs.description: WorldCupViewer team ID tied to this market

outputs.name: polymarketConditionId
outputs.description: Polymarket condition ID metadata

outputs.name: marketSlug
outputs.description: Polymarket market slug or URL path

outputs.name: label
outputs.description: Human-readable market label/thesis

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: active
outputs.description: Whether this mapping is currently active

methods.name: getMarketTiming
methods.description: Read match start, betting close, and earliest settlement timestamps for one market.

outputs.name: matchStartTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp for scheduled match start; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: bettingCloseTime
outputs.description: Configurable Unix timestamp when betting UI should lock; 0 if unknown

outputs.name: settlementEarliestTime
outputs.description: Configurable earliest timestamp to attempt refreshSettlement; 0 if unknown

vaultDataSchema.description: Launches a Flap V2 WorldCupPolymarketVault clone. worldCupViewer zero defaults on BNB mainnet; operator zero uses creator; bettingVault optional receives tax rewards for bettors.

fields.name: worldCupViewer
fields.description: Optional WorldCupViewer address; on BNB mainnet zero address uses the Flap WorldCupViewer default

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Optional day-to-day operator; zero address falls back to token creator

fields.name: bettingVault
fields.description: Optional standalone betting vault that receives BNB tax rewards for bettors

vaultDataSchema.factoryNotes: vaultData = abi.encode((address worldCupViewer, address operator, address bettingVault)). Betting vault is the standalone reward receiver; Flap vault remains V2 metadata/tax-revenue surface.

factory.name: WorldCupPolymarketVaultFactory
notes: Quote token must be native BNB.
Zero worldCupViewer uses the BSC WorldCupViewer default on mainnet.
bettingVault connects this Flap tax vault to the standalone betting reward receiver for bettors.
